Description:
Find out about the new features in .NET 11 Preview 2 across the .NET runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, C#, .NET MAUI, and more!

The post [.NET 11 Preview 2 is now available!](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/dotnet/dotnet-11-preview-2/) appeared first on [.NET Blog](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/dotnet).
Title: .NET 11 Preview 2 is now available!
Author: .NET Team
EnhancedContent:
Today, we are excited to announce the second preview release of .NET 11! This release includes improvements across the .NET Runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, .NET MAUI, F#, Entity Framework Core, container images, and more. Check out the full release notes linked below and get started today.

[Download .NET 11 Preview 2](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/11.0)

This release contains the following improvements.

## **📚Libraries**

- [Generic `GetTypeInfo`
for `System.Text.Json`](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/libraries.md#generic-gettypeinfo-for-systemtextjson)
- [Tar archive format selection](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/libraries.md#tar-archive-format-selection)
- [`Matrix4x4.GetDeterminant`
~15% faster](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/libraries.md#matrix4x4getdeterminant-15-faster)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/libraries.md)

## **⏱️Runtime**

- [Runtime Async (V2)](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/runtime.md#runtime-async-v2)
- [JIT improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/runtime.md#jit)
- [Cached interface dispatch and other VM improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/runtime.md#vm)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/runtime.md)

## **🛠️ SDK**

- [Smaller SDK installers on Linux and macOS](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/sdk.md#smaller-sdk-installers-on-linux-and-macos)
- [Code analyzer improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/sdk.md#code-analyzer-improvements)
- [New SDK warnings and build targets](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/sdk.md#new-sdk-warnings-and-build-targets)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/sdk.md)

## **C#**

.NET 11 Preview 2 doesn’t include any notable new C# language features or breaking changes. Browse the [What’s new in C#](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/csharp/whats-new/) documentation for details.

## **F#**

- [Simplified DIM interface hierarchies](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/fsharp.md#simplified-dim-interface-hierarchies)
- [Overload resolution caching](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/fsharp.md#overload-resolution-caching)
- [`#elif`
preprocessor directive](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/fsharp.md#elif-preprocessor-directive)
- [`partitionWith`
for collections](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/fsharp.md#partitionwith-for-collections)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/fsharp.md)

## **Visual Basic**

.NET 11 Preview 2 doesn’t include any notable new Visual Basic language features or breaking changes. Browse the [What’s new in Visual Basic](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/visual-basic/whats-new/) documentation for details.

## **🌐 ASP.NET Core & Blazor**

- [Native OpenTelemetry tracing for ASP.NET Core](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md#native-opentelemetry-tracing-for-aspnet-core)
- [TempData support for Blazor](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md#tempdata-support-for-blazor)
- [OpenAPI 3.2.0 support](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md#openapi-320-support-breaking-change)
- [.NET Web Worker project template](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md#net-web-worker-project-template)
- [Performance improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md#performance-improvements)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/aspnetcore.md)

## **📱 .NET MAUI**

- [Map control improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#map-control-improvements)
- [TypedBinding performance improvements](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#typedbinding-performance-improvements)
- [Immutability annotations for `Color`
and `Font`](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#immutability-annotations-for-color-and-font)
- [VisualStateManager API consistency](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#visualstatemanager-api-consistency)

### **.NET for Android**

- [Fixes and improvements to `dotnet run`](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#fixes-and-improvements-to-dotnet-run)
- [Use response files when calling `r8.jar`](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#use-response-files-when-calling-r8jar)
- [CoreCLR now requires API 24 and higher](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md#coreclr-on-android-requires-api-24-or-higher)

Browse the [full release notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/dotnetmaui.md) for all of this and more, including experimental CoreCLR support for .NET for iOS, Mac Catalyst, macOS, and tvOS.

## **🖥️ Windows Forms**

.NET 11 Preview 2 doesn’t include any notable new Windows Forms features or breaking changes. Browse the [What’s new in Windows Forms](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/desktop/winforms/whats-new/) documentation for details.

## **🖥️ Windows Presentation Foundation (WPF)**

This release focused on quality improvements, including a fix to guard against crashes caused by Desktop Window Manager (DWM) failures. A full list of changes can be found in the [release notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/wpf.md).

## **🎁 Entity Framework Core**

- [Support for LINQ `MaxBy`
and `MinBy`](https://learn.microsoft.com/ef/core/what-is-new/ef-core-11.0/whatsnew#linq-maxby-minby)
- [Support for SQL Server DiskANN vector indexes and `VECTOR_SEARCH()`](https://learn.microsoft.com/ef/core/what-is-new/ef-core-11.0/whatsnew#sqlserver-vector-search)
- [Support for creating SQL Server full-text catalogs and indexes](https://learn.microsoft.com/ef/core/what-is-new/ef-core-11.0/whatsnew#sqlserver-full-text)
- [Support for SQL Server `JSON_CONTAINS()`](https://learn.microsoft.com/ef/core/what-is-new/ef-core-11.0/whatsnew#sql-server-json-contains)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/efcore.md)

## **📦 Container Images**

- [SDK container images are up to 17% smaller](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/containers.md#sdk-container-images-are-up-to-17-smaller)
- [Full Release Notes](https://github.com/dotnet/core/blob/main/release-notes/11.0/preview/preview2/containers.md)

## 🚀 Get started

To get started with .NET 11, [install the .NET 11 SDK](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/11.0).

If you’re on Windows using Visual Studio, we recommend installing the latest [Visual Studio 2026 Insiders](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/insiders). You can also use Visual Studio Code and the [C# Dev Kit](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ms-dotnettools.csdevkit) extension with .NET 11.
